changelog: v2.0.2: Server Updater (4-layer remote monitoring — Steam builds, Oxide/uMod, MetaMod+SourceMod+CSSharp, per-plugin GitHub), admin-only 'Other Tools' section with downloadable modules, role-based access (admin/premium/user), Windows autostart + start-minimized toggles, first-launch wizard %APPDATA% default, refreshed Google Apps Script integration.
